hero.title: Independent Damp Surveys in {areaName}
hero.description: Providing accurate diagnostics, independent reporting, and clear remediation guidance for homeowners, landlords, housing providers, and developers across London, the Home Countries and the Midlands.
hero.formSubtitle: Tell us what you're seeing and we'll point you toward the right next step.

items: We're an independent consultancy providing accurate damp, mould, and waterproofing investigations — not sales-driven quotes. At True Damp Specialists, we do things differently. We're an independent consultancy, not a treatment company. Our purpose is to identify causes, not sell cures.
Our PCA-trained surveyors deliver detailed diagnostics and evidence-based reporting to uncover the true cause of moisture issues across residential, commercial, and complex properties.

contentBlocks.title: Our surveys include:
items: Salt testing, thermal imaging, and air quality analysis.
Invasive and non-invasive surveys — internal and external.
Awaab's Law–compliant reporting for residential cases.
Second opinions and complex case support.
Pre-sale and pre-purchase surveys for homeowners and buyers.
Remediation planning with clear, practical recommendations.
We help homeowners, housing associations, and managing agents make informed decisions based on evidence — not commission.
Many clients come to us after receiving generic, one-size-fits-all reports or sales-driven advice that failed to resolve the real cause of moisture problems.

items.title: Investigate, Don't Sell
items.description: We don't sell chemical injections, membranes, or quick fixes. We investigate, analyse, and report — giving you confidence and a clear plan built on facts.

items.title: British Standards Aligned
items.description: Our surveys are built around BS 6576, BS 5250, BS 8102 and PCA investigative methodology, ensuring every recommendation is technically correct.

items.title: Trusted Remediation Partners
items.description: When works are required, we guide you toward proven, accredited specialists using systems from Newton Waterproofing, Delta Membranes, Safeguard Europe and Wykamol.

items.title: Clear, Actionable Reports
items.description: Every report includes clear diagnostics, example cost guidance, and repair method recommendations — so you know what's necessary and what's right for your property.

items: Our independence isn't about distance — it's about integrity. Whether you're a homeowner, landlord, developer, or housing association, we help you make informed decisions based on evidence — not persuasion.

services.differenceIntro: We provide independent damp, mould, and waterproofing surveys, detailed diagnostics, and clear reporting for both residential and commercial properties.
services.differenceLead: Our expertise covers every aspect of moisture investigation, compliance, and remedial design — helping clients understand, resolve, and prevent future issues.
differenceBullets: Damp & Mould, Thermal and Salt Analysis — pinpointing the source, cause, and extent of damp.
Awaab's Law–compliant reporting for residential cases — aligned with the latest housing and health standards.
COSHH-aligned risk assessments for commercial premises — ensuring safety for staff, tenants, and the public.
Second opinions and complex case support — clarity on misdiagnosed, ongoing, or disputed problems.
Invasive surveys where required — exposing wall, floor, and ceiling areas to confirm hidden damp or structural issues.
CCTV and drainage surveys — investigating below-ground and concealed sources of moisture ingress.
Pre-sale and pre-purchase surveys — helping homeowners and buyers avoid costly surprises.
Remediation planning and consultation — practical, compliant solutions built around BS 8102, BS 5250, and PCA methodology.
Multi-unit and communal building assessments — supporting landlords, housing associations, and managing agents.
services.differenceClosing: No sales targets. No quick fixes. Just facts, clarity and necessary solutions that last.

accreditation.title: Built for clarity, not hard-sell treatment
accreditation.description: Every client deserves clarity, honesty, and solutions that last. We don't offer quick fixes — we deliver confidence. Each survey and report is backed by independent methodology, measurable data, and full professional indemnity insurance. If you're not completely satisfied that we've identified the cause of your issue or provided clear next steps, we'll review your case again — free of charge. Independent. Evidence-based. Reliable. That's our promise — and our guarantee.

hero.title: Common questions about damp investigations
hero.description: Helpful answers for homeowners, buyers, landlords and property teams who want to understand how independent damp diagnosis works.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search questions about damp, mould or surveys...

faqs.question: What makes an independent damp survey different?
faqs.answer: The difference is independence from treatment sales. The survey is there to explain the likely cause, the contributing factors and the sensible next step, not to funnel every issue into the same product or repair.

faqs.question: Do you work for homeowners and buyers?
faqs.answer: Yes. Homeowners and buyers are a core audience for this kind of work because they often need clarity before spending money or progressing with a purchase.

faqs.question: Do you also support landlords and property professionals?
faqs.answer: Yes. The same technical approach can be applied for landlords, housing providers, managing agents, developers and commercial clients where evidence and reporting discipline matter.

faqs.question: How much does an independent damp survey cost?
faqs.answer: The brief suggests typical public market expectations in the region of a few hundred pounds for a comprehensive survey, but the exact cost depends on the property, complexity, and whether specialist investigation or reporting is required.

faqs.question: Why pay for a survey when some companies offer free inspections?
faqs.answer: Because free inspections are often tied to a treatment sale. Paying for an independent opinion can prevent the wrong work, avoid unnecessary expense and produce a clearer basis for the decision that follows.

faqs.question: Can you help with pre-purchase or pre-sale concerns?
faqs.answer: Yes. Independent reporting can be especially useful where damp has been flagged in a purchase, where a lender or surveyor has raised concerns, or where clarity is needed before works or a sale.

faqs.question: Can you tell the difference between rising damp, penetrating damp and condensation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Distinguishing between those mechanisms is one of the main reasons to commission a proper investigation. The correct answer depends on the building, the readings, the defect pattern and the broader context.

faqs.question: Do you deal with black mould and condensation problems?
faqs.answer: Yes. That includes ventilation, humidity, dew-point behaviour, occupancy patterns, building defects and the wider reasons mould is recurring.

faqs.question: Can you look at basements and below-ground waterproofing?
faqs.answer: Yes. Below-ground cases often need a more specialist waterproofing lens, especially where BS 8102 thinking or previous waterproofing systems are part of the picture.

faqs.question: What does the report actually help me do?
faqs.answer: A good report should help you make a better decision. That may mean deciding whether work is needed, what kind of specialist should do it, what should be prioritised, or whether previous advice was wrong.

faqs.question: Can you review someone else's report or failed treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes. Second-opinion work is especially valuable where the original explanation did not resolve the problem or the proposed solution does not seem to match the evidence.

faqs.question: Do you provide practical next-step guidance if works are needed?
faqs.answer: Yes. The goal is not to stop at diagnosis, but to explain what the sensible remedial direction looks like and what should be considered before work begins.

partners.title: Current best practice, without manufacturer bias
partners.intro: We operate independently but stay up to date with industry-leading manufacturers and training providers — including Newton Waterproofing, Delta Membranes, Safeguard Europe, and Wykamol — to ensure our guidance always reflects current best practice and technical standards.
partners.body: We know the systems, but we are not paid to specify one brand over another. Whether inspecting a single home or advising a national housing provider, our focus remains the same — clarity, accuracy, and independence.
partners.imageAlt: Consultation and review of damp survey reporting with a client

testimonial.quote: Rob took time to explain the leak damage properly, guided us through every step and produced a thorough report that made the next move much clearer.
testimonial.author: Joe

items.question: Why pay for an independent survey?
items.answer: Because the goal is diagnosis, not a tied treatment sale. You get evidence-led reasoning you can rely on for the next decision.

items.question: Do you carry out remedial works?
items.answer: Our core role is investigation, reporting and remedial planning. We help you understand what work is appropriate and how to procure it.

closing: Whether inspecting a single home or advising a national housing provider, our focus remains the same — clarity, accuracy, and independence.
Every inspection is carried out with the same detailed, structured approach — from initial moisture readings to full remedial strategy planning.

Data-led investigations — using calibrated instruments and photographic evidence. Independent reporting — clear, factual, and easy to follow. Remediation design and oversight — when needed, ensuring all solutions are cost-effective and compliant.
Continuous professional development — every team member participates in PCA, CPD or manufacturer training to maintain the highest technical standards.
Our strength lies in understanding both the science of moisture and the reality of property performance — giving every client confidence that what we find, recommend, and design is right first time.
